title: Venezuelan Quesadilla
description: A delicious Venezuelan quesadilla filled with cheese and cheesy goodness.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Place a quesadilla in the skillet and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of it.
Fold the other half of the quesadilla to cover the cheese.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for another 2 minutes.
Repeat with the remaining quesadillas and cheese.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve hot.
